fields.title: Implement autoresearch task contract, phase snapshots, and /autoresearch commands
fields.description:
Replace the current cwd-global autoresearch mode with a task-scoped autoresearch workflow on top of the shared loop engine.

Implement:
- /autoresearch create|start|resume|pause|stop|status|archive|cancel|clean
- task documents at .pi/loops/tasks/<task-id>.md with mandatory frontmatter
- machine-owned task-file anchors for workflow-managed sections
- immutable autoresearch phase snapshots under .pi/loops/phases/**

For kind: autoresearch, frontmatter must include the user-authored benchmark contract with benchmark.command, optional benchmark.checks_command, metric name/unit/direction, scope.root, scope.paths, scope.off_limits, constraints, and optional limits.max_iterations. scope.root must be the execution root; there must be no hidden workingDir config.

Phase identity must be computed from the normalized benchmark contract plus the pinned execution profile captured at phase start. Markdown notes, ideas, findings, and progress must remain non-phase-defining.
